positive: A sophisticated, stylized cosmic forest scene. Depict abstract, interconnected glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna roots spreading across a deep indigo and emerald palette. The central composition features towering, stylized crystalline trees with intricate vein patterns and soft, ethereal glow effects. Use a strong silhouette aesthetic with deep blacks contrasting sharply against vibrant, neon-infused cosmic dust and gentle nebula backdrops. The overall mood is mysterious, tranquil, and high-energy. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Minimalist details, vector-art quality, detailed line work, central focus, high contrast.
